positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a sleepy fox curled up inside a giant, glowing mushroom. The style should be soft, pastel, and highly detailed, with visible brushstrokes and forest elements like dew drops and moss. Studio Ghibli aesthetic, vibrant yet muted color palette.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital noise, over-saturated
